no: AI-generated English voiceovers for all SoD characters by ColossusChang. Over 7,000 voiced lines. Installable mid-playthrough. Compatible with EET regardless of EET_End position.
sum: AI-generated English voiceovers for all characters in Siege of Dragonspear. Over 7,000 voiced lines.

co.no: Adds AI-generated English voiceovers to all SoD dialogue. Over 7,000 lines. Large download.
